title: Reproducible Comparative Study of GA-PSO and Baseline Metaheuristics for Constrained Operational Optimization of Radial Distribution Networks
description: Public reproducibility package for a comparative study of GA-PSO and baseline metaheuristics for constrained operational optimization of radial distribution networks. The repository includes source code, configurations, seeds, redacted/public benchmark assets, result tables, and figure-generation scripts required to reproduce the main comparative experiments reported in the associated manuscript.

creators.name: Qiu, Hong
